titleStmt.title: SII 26.168: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 168. (A.R. No. 157-B of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

p.hi: Kōṉēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ: Vīranārāyaṇa (?): No date: c. 1139-49 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription, which is slightly damaged, records a grant of land in Tiruvālanduṟai alias Kēraḷakēsarinallūr in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu, made by the king and entrusted to a certain Kaṇṇabhaṭṭaṉ, a servant of the temple of Vīrachōḻīśvaramuḍaiyār at Koḻumam to provide for food-offerings to the deity Dakshiṇāmūrttī, set up in the above-mentioned temple (for his own merit). Also records an order stipulating that the maṉṟāḍis should measure out oil for the sandhyā-dīpam and provide for the procession of Śrībali.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ karaivaḻināṭṭuk koḻumattu Āḷuṭaiyār viracoḷiccaramuṭaiyār koyilil tevakaṉ
mi kaṇṇapaṭṭaṉukku nam Olai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu na Eḻun taruḷuvitta dakṣiṇāmurtti devaṟku Amutupaṭikku viṭṭanilam Iṉṉāṭṭut tiru vālantuṟai Āṉa keraḷakecarinallūriluvāka ko mulaiyil coḻarāyaṉ ta n tukku meṟkum poypilukku vaṭakkum peruvāykkālukku kiḻakkum teṟkum Iṉnāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam kaikkoṇṭu Amutupaṭi celuttuva
viracoḻiccuramuṭaiyār nallūril Eḻuntaruḷuvitta tiruvā kku nālukkum sandiyādipa śrīpali Eḻun=taruḷa
śrīmāheśvara koyiliṟ civaprāmaṇaṉ kaṇṇapaṭṭaṉu ma manṟāṭikaḷum kūṭiiruntu ka kuṭi ḷāka rākavum maṉṟāṭikaḷuṭpaṭa kuṭi
luṅ Ivakaḷ Aḷappārākavum maṉṟāṭṭu Ivviruvar makkaḷ makkaḷukke celavutākavum Immaṉṟāṭikaḷe Ivveṇṇai Aḷappārāka
Digital edition of SII 26.168 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
